title: create v4 modpack
description: Survival Modpack, which is all about the Mod Create
body:
This modpack add a lot of vanilla plus features like new biomes, mobs, features, and Create!

There are some create addons like: Create deco, Create Enchantment Industry, Create TFMG or Create Numismatics.

If you want to explore a world with new cave biomes, enhanced nether, new end content, create, new wood types, a bunch of new building blocs, new mobs, new structures, and have fun with your friends or in singleplayer, then play this modpack

<details>
<summary>non modrinth mods:</summary>

More Villagers Mod: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-villagers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-villagers)

</details>

...and sorry if my english is not perfect, I am from Poland
